recommendations.title: Pluto's Christmas Tree

recommendations.title: Chef Donald
recommendations.overview: Donald decides to try cooking along with a radio show.

recommendations.title: Mickey's Magical Christmas: Snowed in at the House of Mouse
recommendations.overview: When a huge snowstorm leaves everyone stranded, Mickey and all of his guests at the House of Mouse, including Pooh, Belle, Snow White, Cinderella, Ariel and many more of his old and new friends, break out the cookies and hot chocolate to help Donald
recommendations.director: Tony Craig, Burny Mattinson, Bobs Gannaway, Jack Hannah

recommendations.title: Lambert the Sheepish Lion
recommendations.overview: Disney Legend Sterling Holloway narrates this classic animated short. A mix-up by Mr. Stork finds a little lion cub in the care of a gentle flock of sheep. Doted on by his mother, but teased by the other lambs, Lambert soon grows to become a massive

recommendations.title: Mickey's House of Villains
recommendations.overview: The villains from the popular animated Disney films are gathered at the House of Mouse with plans to take over. Soon, the villains take over the house and kick out Mickey, Donald and Goofy. It's all up to Mickey and his friends to overthrow evil and
recommendations.director: Bobs Gannaway, Jamie Mitchell, Jack Hannah, Mike Moon, Tony Craig, Burt Gillett, Rick Schneider, Jack King

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: The Wise Little Hen

recommendations.title: Der Fuehrer's Face
